title: Recently Deleted
drDigitalIntro: Deleted a photo by accident? It goes to Recently Deleted for 30 days. You can restore it anytime within that window. After 30 days, it's permanently gone. This safety net means you can delete freely without worrying about losing a photo forever.

playgroundTask.question: You delete a photo by accident. How long do you have to recover it from Recently Deleted?

drDigitalSuccess: 30 days! That's your safety window. After that, Recently Deleted clears automatically.
drDigitalHint: Photos gives you a generous 30-day buffer — enough time to notice a mistake.
